subcodes.first_line: O pure-souled photographer! In His travels throughout East and West, 'Abdu'l-Bahá beheld reflections [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عکاس طاهر الانفاس عبدالبهاء در اقلیم شرق و غرب آنچه سیاحت نمود انعکاس
subcodes.subjects: @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @material world a reflection of the spiritual
